title: Ceasefire Negotiations in Gaza
summary: Indirect ceasefire negotiations between Israel and Hamas resumed in Qatar, mediated by the US, Egypt, and Qatar.

sources.article_title: Qatar Hosts New Round of Gaza Ceasefire Talks
sources.snippet: Senior officials from both sides arrived in Doha for indirect talks aimed at securing a temporary halt to fighting and a hostage-prisoner exchange.
key_points: Talks held in Doha with US, Egypt, Qatar as mediators
No breakthrough yet — gaps remain on day-after governance
sources.notes: Haaretz emphasizes diplomatic complexity and internal Israeli disagreements.

sources.article_title: Negotiations Resume: Optimism Rises After Doha Meeting
sources.snippet: Israeli officials expressed cautious optimism after a day of talks, with a framework deal reportedly closer than in previous rounds.
key_points: Hamas position on permanent ceasefire still a sticking point
sources.notes: Ynet leads with Israeli government perspective and security angle.

sources.article_title: Gaza Ceasefire Talks Resume Amid Pressure From Washington
sources.snippet: The Biden administration pushed hard for a deal before the transition of power, adding urgency to this round of negotiations in Doha.
key_points: Strong US pressure before power transition
Families of hostages hold vigil outside prime minister's office
sources.notes: Times of Israel contextualizes the US political timeline and family pressure.

title: Supreme Court Rules on Judicial Reform Law
summary: Israel's Supreme Court struck down a key law that would have restricted judicial review of government decisions, ruling it unconstitutional.

sources.article_title: Supreme Court Strikes Down Reasonableness Law in Historic Ruling
sources.snippet: In a 8-7 majority, the court ruled that the Knesset cannot strip the judiciary of its power to review government decisions for reasonableness.
key_points: Court asserted power to review Basic Laws

sources.article_title: High Court Blocks Reasonableness Law — Coalition Furious
sources.snippet: Coalition ministers slammed the ruling, with some calling for steps to override the decision. Opposition celebrated the ruling as a victory for democracy.

sources.article_title: In Landmark Decision, Supreme Court Nullifies Judicial Reform Legislation
sources.snippet: The court's decision is the first time it has ever struck down a Basic Law, setting a new precedent for constitutional review in Israel.
key_points: First time a Basic Law was nullified

title: Israeli AI Startup Reaches $1B Valuation
summary: Tel Aviv-based AI security startup crossed the unicorn threshold after a $200M funding round led by US investors.

sources.article_title: Another Israeli Unicorn: AI Firm Reaches $1B Valuation
sources.snippet: The company, which develops AI-powered threat detection for enterprise networks, said it will use the funds to expand into the US and European markets.
key_points: Expansion into US and European markets planned

sources.article_title: Cybersecurity Unicorn Born Despite War: Investors Bet on Israeli AI
sources.snippet: The funding round signals continued investor confidence in Israeli tech despite the ongoing conflict, with US venture capital leading the round.

sources.article_title: War Has Not Stopped Israeli Startups: New Unicorn Emerges in AI Security
sources.snippet: Despite talent mobilization and economic uncertainty, Israel's startup ecosystem continues to attract global capital, with this deal among the largest of 2024.
key_points: One of the largest Israeli funding rounds of 2024
Talent mobilization was a challenge the company navigated
Founders cite 8200 alumni network as key advantage
